'''hofazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oikoclitic|oikoclitic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oikoclitic|oikoclitic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hofazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hofazhithi|hofazhithi]] || [[word:hofazhiji|hofazhiji]] || [[word:hofazhishi|hofazhishi]] || [[word:hofazhiki|hofazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hofazhuthuthu|hofazhuthuthu]] || [[word:hofazhujuju|hofazhujuju]] || [[word:hofazhushushu|hofazhushushu]] || [[word:hofazhukuku|hofazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hofazhuthu|hofazhuthu]] || [[word:hofazhuju|hofazhuju]] || [[word:hofazhushu|hofazhushu]] || [[word:hofazhuku|hofazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hofazhufthuf|hofazhufthuf]] || [[word:hofazhufjuf|hofazhufjuf]] || [[word:hofazhufshuf|hofazhufshuf]] || [[word:hofazhufkuf|hofazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hofazhethe|hofazhethe]] || [[word:hofazheje|hofazheje]] || [[word:hofazheshe|hofazheshe]] || [[word:hofazheke|hofazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hofazhothotho|hofazhothotho]] || [[word:hofazhojojo|hofazhojojo]] || [[word:hofazhoshosho|hofazhoshosho]] || [[word:hofazhokoko|hofazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hofazhotho|hofazhotho]] || [[word:hofazhojo|hofazhojo]] || [[word:hofazhosho|hofazhosho]] || [[word:hofazhoko|hofazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hofazhofthof|hofazhofthof]] || [[word:hofazhofjof|hofazhofjof]] || [[word:hofazhofshof|hofazhofshof]] || [[word:hofazhofkof|hofazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hofazhïfthïf|hofazhïfthïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfjïf|hofazhïfjïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfshïf|hofazhïfshïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfkïf|hofazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hofazhïfthïfthïf|hofazhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfjïfjïf|hofazhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfshïfshïf|hofazhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfkïfkïf|hofazhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hofazhïfthïf|hofazhïfthïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfjïf|hofazhïfjïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfshïf|hofazhïfshïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfkïf|hofazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hofazhïfthïf|hofazhïfthïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfjïf|hofazhïfjïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfshïf|hofazhïfshïf]] || [[word:hofazhïfkïf|hofazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hofazhæthæ|hofazhæthæ]] || [[word:hofazhæjæ|hofazhæjæ]] || [[word:hofazhæshæ|hofazhæshæ]] || [[word:hofazhækæ|hofazhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hofazhathatha|hofazhathatha]] || [[word:hofazhajaja|hofazhajaja]] || [[word:hofazhashasha|hofazhashasha]] || [[word:hofazhakaka|hofazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hofazhatha|hofazhatha]] || [[word:hofazhaja|hofazhaja]] || [[word:hofazhasha|hofazhasha]] || [[word:hofazhaka|hofazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hofazhafthaf|hofazhafthaf]] || [[word:hofazhafjaf|hofazhafjaf]] || [[word:hofazhafshaf|hofazhafshaf]] || [[word:hofazhafkaf|hofazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hofazhasha|hofazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hofazhshësha|hofazhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hofazhrosha|hofazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hofazhmusha|hofazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hofazhyasha|hofazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohofazhnkshësha|gohofazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohofazhnkrosha|gohofazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohofazhnkmusha|gohofazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohofazhnkyasha|gohofazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hofafazhasha|hofafazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hofafazhshësha|hofafazhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hofafazhrosha|hofafazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hofafazhmusha|hofafazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hofafazhyasha|hofafazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohofafazhnkshësha|gohofafazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohofafazhnkrosha|gohofafazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohofafazhnkmusha|gohofafazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohofafazhnkyasha|gohofafazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hefæzhasha|hefæzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hefæzhshësha|hefæzhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hefæzhrosha|hefæzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hefæzhmusha|hefæzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hefæzhyasha|hefæzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohefæzhnkshësha|gohefæzhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohefæzhnkrosha|gohefæzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohefæzhnkmusha|gohefæzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohefæzhnkyasha|gohefæzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hofazhasha|hofazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hofazhshësha|hofazhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hofazhrosha|hofazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hofazhmusha|hofazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hofazhyasha|hofazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohofazhnkshësha|gohofazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohofazhnkrosha|gohofazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohofazhnkmusha|gohofazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohofazhnkyasha|gohofazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
